items.title: Tent Camping
items.desc: Sleep under the stars with comfortable tents, bonfire, and the sounds of nature all around you.

items.title: Outdoor Dining
items.desc: Enjoy freshly cooked meals in our open-air dining area surrounded by greenery and fresh air.

items.title: Children's Play Area
items.desc: A safe outdoor play space with swings, open ground, and plenty of room for kids to run and play.

items.title: Garden Walks
items.desc: Take a peaceful stroll through our green garden and enjoy the calm countryside atmosphere.

items.title: Family Gatherings
items.desc: Celebrate birthdays, anniversaries, or simply enjoy quality time with your loved ones.

items.title: Events & Parties
items.desc: Host small parties, team outings, or celebrations in our spacious outdoor event area.

food.title: Taste of Maharashtra
food.subtitle: Fresh, home-style cooking with farm ingredients
food.desc: Our kitchen serves authentic Maharashtrian food — from spicy Kolhapuri chicken to comforting dal-rice. Every meal is prepared fresh with love and local spices.

room.title: Comfortable Rooms
room.subtitle: Clean, spacious, and family-friendly
room.desc: Our rooms are designed for comfort and relaxation. Clean linens, attached bathroom, and a view of the surrounding greenery — everything you need for a restful stay.
